sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, map('k1', 3, 'k2', NULL, 'k3', 2)), (2, map('k4', 5, 'k5', 1, 'k6', 0));
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_map WHERE mapPartialSort((k, v) -> v + 1, 2, data) = map('k1', 3, 'k2', NULL, 'k3', 2));
SELECT COUNT() FROM test_map WHERE EXISTS(SELECT mapPartialSort((k, v) -> v, 1, data) WHERE id = 1);
SELECT mapPartialSort((k, v) -> toString(v), 2, map('k1', NULL, 'k2', 10, 'k3', -5));
SELECT id, mapPartialSort((k, v) -> k, 3, data) FROM test_map WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM numbers(10) WHERE number = 5);
CREATE TABLE numbers_test AS SELECT number FROM numbers(10);
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM numbers_test WHERE number > 8) AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_map WHERE mapPartialSort((k, v) -> v, 2, data) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT() FROM test_map WHERE EXISTS(SELECT number FROM numbers(10) WHERE number < 0);
SELECT mapPartialSort((k, v) -> toInt32(v), 2, map('k1', -1, 'k2', 2, 'k3', NULL, 'k4', 5));
